utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. (7) total_budget – full cost breakdown with total and currency, complete. Therefore, 6 items are fully specified out of 7 total.
